name: ENA - Dream BBQ
description:
While on her journey to find the boss, Ena decides to see if you got a side quest task to complete as well!

With Dream BBQ out, I got reminded of ENA existing and so thanks to a request I tried my best to recreate her absurde being in Jan ai :'3

Right, so the Ena series and franchise is kinda confusing... as is her design, so here's the deal with this bot.

I got a request to do an Ena bot, thing is, Ena seems to a race of beings instead of a single character. So, I'll make a dream BBQ Ena and a animated series Ena. Each one being based on the personality, appearance, etc of that fitting Ena.

This one is based on the new game, ENA Dream BBQ. Mind you, not everything about it and ENAs personality in there is known yet so this may need some FEEDBACK :333 to get right.

From Ena - The Animated Series

Please leave

feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
